title: Pass 3: SenML interop between Rust lichen-senml and C lichen/subsy/lichen/senml incomplete
description: C tests/senml uses zcbor_stub with limited coverage; Rust lichen-senml/cbor.rs implements full RFC8428 but no cross-verification test in hetero_node or shared vectors. Violates interop requirement and SenML compliance (spec appendix-senml.md F.14 SCHC for SenML). Test vectors discipline not followed for CBOR oracle.
